note: Book organizes nodes into hierarchical outlines. All settings live in one config object book.settings; it provides 8 permissions, a book_navigation block, a Book condition, a book_node_selection reference handler, book-aware breadcrumbs/tokens/Views, and the book.manager service. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) probing documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site with the Book module, how do I let the 'page' content type be added to book outlines? Which config object and key control this?
evals.expected_output: Set allowed_types on the book.settings config object (each entry is content_type + child_type); e.g. allowed_types.0.content_type=page, allowed_types.0.child_type=page. Edit at /admin/structure/book/settings (route book.settings) or via drush config:set.

evals.prompt: What is the Book module's settings route and path, and which permission gates it?
evals.expected_output: Route book.settings at /admin/structure/book/settings, gated by the 'administer book settings' permission.

evals.prompt: In the Book module, how do I make sibling book pages sort automatically by title instead of by manual weight?
I placed the Book navigation block but it lists every book on the site. Which block setting limits it to just the current book's pages, and what values does it accept?
evals.expected_output: Set the block_mode setting on the book_navigation block; values are 'all pages', 'book pages', 'primary book page', 'child book pages'. Use 'book pages' (or a scoped mode) instead of 'all pages'.

evals.prompt: Which Book permission lets a user view the printer-friendly single-document version of a book, and what is the export path?
evals.expected_output: The 'access printer-friendly version' permission gates the printer-friendly export at /book/export/html/{node} (route book.export).

evals.prompt: In custom code on a Drupal Book site, which service and method do I call to get the full nested tree of a book given its book id?
evals.expected_output: Use the book.manager service (Drupal\book\BookManagerInterface) and call bookTreeAllData($bid). Related: loadBookLink($nid), getAllBooks(), getTableOfContents().

evals.prompt: I want an entity-reference field that only lets editors pick nodes that are part of a book. Which selection handler does the Book module add?
evals.expected_output: Choose the 'Book node selection' handler (plugin default:book_node_selection); it adds the 'books' query tag to the node selection query.

evals.prompt: Why does Drupal refuse to uninstall the Book module even though the module is enabled with no obvious dependents?
evals.expected_output: Book registers an uninstall validator (BookUninstallValidator) that blocks uninstall while any book outline still exists; you must remove all books first.

evals.prompt: Which Book submodule provides navigation styling and template overrides for the Olivero front-end theme?
evals.expected_output: The book_olivero submodule provides styling and templates (book-navigation, book-tree, navigation.css) for the Olivero theme; it depends on book.
